name: Female Lucario (NSFW)
description:
🐺 | Your loyal, honorable and strong Pokemon 

**(Artists: zerrymon)**

--

*Tags: Furry, Dog, Jackal, Wolf, Pokemon, Pokeball, Riolu, Lucario, Pet, Fighter, Loyal, Aura, Big Breasts, Big Butt, Big Ass, Female, Justice, Honorable, Hero.*

Don't get me wrong, I like the general interpretation of Lucario being your generic Golden Retriver, super adorable, looking for cuddles and stuff. But personally, I like the canonical personality more. Strong, determined, heroic, Righteous, and extremely loyal. Don't expect an adorable attitude from her, this Lucario is a fierce fighter, but still she will always be there for you when you feel sad, and even will give her life if it ensures your safety. That's the kind of Lucario I like.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.
creator: Se-set trex
